scope.en: End-to-end LLM/GenAI document pipeline for medical/administrative workflows (ingestionвҶ’OCRвҶ’classificationвҶ’validationвҶ’export).
scope.es: Pipeline LLM/GenAI de punta a punta para flujos mГ©dico-administrativos (ingestiГіnвҶ’OCRвҶ’clasificaciГіnвҶ’validaciГіnвҶ’exportaciГіn).

en: Designed an event-driven, microservice-oriented document-processing pipeline leveraging Kafka topics for decoupled ingestion, enrichment, and delivery stages.
Built orchestrations with Apache Airflow (DAGs with task-level retries, SLAs, XCom-based metadata) to coordinate OCR, classification, and validation steps.
Implemented LLM-based components (prompting, few-shot templates, and guardrails) for document classification, entity extraction, and consistency checks.
Set up annotation/ground-truthing workflows and feedback loops to continuously improve model prompts and post-processing heuristics.
de: Entwarf eine ereignisgesteuerte, mikrodienst-orientierte Dokumenten-Verarbeitungspipeline mit Kafka-Topics fГјr entkoppelte Aufnahme, Anreicherung und Lieferungsphasen.
Erstellte Orchestrierungen mit Apache Airflow (DAGs mit Task-Level-Retries, SLAs, XCom-basierte Metadaten) zur Koordination von OCR-, Klassifizierungs- und Validierungsschritten.
Implementierte LLM-basierte Komponenten (Prompting, Few-Shot-Templates und Guardrails) fГјr Dokumentenklassifizierung, Entity-Extraction und KonsistenzprГјfungen.
Setzte Annotations-/Ground-Truthing-Workflows und Feedback-Schleifen auf, um kontinuierlich Prompts und Post-Processing-Heuristiken zu verbessern.
es: DiseГұГ© una canalizaciГіn de procesamiento de documentos orientada a microservicios y eventos, usando Kafka para desacoplar ingestiГіn, enriquecimiento y entrega.
OrquestГ© con Apache Airflow (DAGs con reintentos, SLAs y XCom) las etapas de OCR, clasificaciГіn y validaciГіn.
ImplementГ© componentes basados en LLM (prompting, plantillas few-shot y guardrails) para clasificaciГіn de documentos, extracciГіn de entidades y chequeos de consistencia.
LevantГ© flujos de anotaciГіn/ground-truth y bucles de retroalimentaciГіn para mejorar prompts y reglas de post-proceso de forma continua.

scope.en: Educational AI / Intelligent Tutoring Systems: content modeling, assessment design, learning analytics.

en: Co-led the research stream for an AI-assisted Intelligent Tutor in Linear Algebra (content modeling, task design, and evaluation).
Designed experimental protocols (train/val/test splits, ablations, cross-cohort comparisons) and reproducible pipelines for data and metrics.
Developed model prototypes and supporting services for content recommendation, hint generation, and learner feedback.
Co-authored the ICITED 2025 paper: contributed to methodology, experiments, and results interpretation.

Entwurf von Experimentalprotokollen (Train/Val/Test-Splits, Ablationen, Kohorten-Vergleiche) und reproduciblen Pipelines fГјr Daten und Metriken.

Co-Autor des ICITED 2025 Papers: Beitrag zu Methodik, Experimenten und Ergebnisinterpretation.
es: Co-liderГ© la lГӯnea de investigaciГіn para un Tutor Inteligente asistido por IA en ГҒlgebra Lineal (modelado de contenidos, diseГұo de tareas y evaluaciГіn).
DiseГұГ© protocolos experimentales (splits de train/val/test, ablations, comparaciГіn entre cohortes) y pipelines reproducibles de datos y mГ©tricas.
DesarrollГ© prototipos de modelos y servicios de soporte para recomendaciГіn de contenidos, generaciГіn de pistas y retroalimentaciГіn al estudiante.
Coautor del paper ICITED 2025: aporte a metodologГӯa, experimentos e interpretaciГіn de resultados.
